name: Lord Protector Matholl Mylles aka The Steward

sheet.name: Lord Protector Matholl Mylles aka The Steward
sheet.background_story:
Motto: Honor virtutis pretium

Matholl and Treymayne Praxl led the Grand Cohort for 20 years, ushering a time known as the Golden Age.

After The Schism, Matholl chose self-exile to the Kingdom of Trynn, disgusted by the infighting that has befallen the once Grand Cohort

Matholl has not been seen or heard from for 10 years

He wields a great longsword named "Honor's Virtue"
